abilities.name: Reading the Room
abilities.text: When this model activates, it may discard a card to have friendly models within (aura)2" gain an Insight token.

abilities.name: Serene Countenance
abilities.text: Enemy attack actions that target this model cannot cheat their duel.

abilities.name: Siren Song
abilities.text: Enemy models within 6" with a friendly token suffer -1 to their Wp.

actions.name: This Song's About You
actions.effects: The target may discard up to two cards. Deal 1 irreducible damage to the target for each card it does not discard.

triggers.name: Shrug Off
triggers.text: Remove one token from this model.

triggers.name: Wink and Whisper
triggers.text: This model may drain a (soulstone) to draw a card for each card the target discarded.

actions.name: Beckoning Call
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action may target friendly models.
actions.effects: Move the target its Sp toward a friendly model in its LoS.

triggers.name: Cut Them Down
triggers.text: The target may declare a (melee) action.

triggers.name: Love Hurts
triggers.text: When resolving, this action deals 1 damage to the target.

actions.name: Backup Band
actions.effects: Move the target up to its Sp toward this model. If the target is K.O.T.O., this model and the target both heal 2.
